name: mission-lite
description: Long-running, self-correcting, multi-agent software engineering missions: plan, dispatch workers per feature, validate adversarially per milestone, and resume from disk.

interface.longDescription: Mission Lite turns a broad software goal into a persisted mission: contract-first planning, feature workers, adversarial milestone validation, follow-up fixes, and resumable on-disk state.
defaultPrompt: Use the mission skill to build a multi-feature app.
Start a mission for this refactor.
